title: Bookish Reading v0.3.0
description: Book reading entry stored on Arweave, keyed by wallet address

dateRead.description: JS millisecond epoch timestamp. Date-only values use noon UTC (YYYY-MM-DDT12:00:00.000Z).

readingStartedAt.description: Timestamp when book was moved to reading status

wtrPosition.description: Sort position within the want-to-read list (0 = top)

work_key.description: OpenLibrary work key (e.g., /works/OL5193815W). Used for friend-matching via strict equality. Captured at search time when the source is OL or iTunes-with-OL cross-reference.

isbn13.description: ISBN-13 of the chosen variant. Optional fallback identifier captured from search results when available.

is_private.description: If true, the book is private — excluded from share-log publication and never shown to friends. Absent or false means public (default). Per-book privacy is the spine of the Friends feature; see FRIENDS.md Surface 7 (issue #129).
